title: Script View
noClips: No clips yet, please generate from story view

asset.removeCharacterConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this character from current clip?
asset.removeLocationConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this location from current clip?

confirm.removeCharacter: Are you sure you want to remove this character from current clip?
confirm.removeLocation: Are you sure you want to remove this location from current clip?

productionMode.title: Production Mode
productionMode.subtitle: Confirm this episode's production path before you start drawing

multiShot.label: Multi-shot Segment Mode
multiShot.description: Skip the long traditional storyboard script and move straight into multi-shot segment production

traditional.label: Traditional Mode
traditional.description: Keep the classic storyboard flow for projects that need shot-by-shot control

multiShot.title: This episode will auto-create segment drafts and open multi-shot confirmation
multiShot.description: After you click the button below, the workflow uses the episode's clip structure to auto-create multi-shot segment drafts, opens the confirmation step, and waits for you to continue to videos.
multiShot.model: This fast path is clip-structure-driven: a typical episode lands around eight 15-second segments, and each segment is one video-generation unit. Confirm references here before you continue to videos.

traditional.title: This episode will enter traditional storyboard generation
traditional.description: After you click the button below, the workflow continues through the traditional script-to-storyboard path.

cta.multiShot: Current mode: Multi-shot Segment Mode. The next step auto-creates segment drafts and opens the multi-shot confirmation step; video generation starts only after you continue to videos.
cta.traditional: Current mode: Traditional Mode. The next step generates traditional storyboard content.

generate.missingAssets: {count} referenced characters/locations are still missing images
generate.missingAssetsTip: You can still generate storyboard text now, but before generating panel images please finish the referenced character and location images in

preview.title: Storyboard Import Preview
preview.overwrite: This will create {create} segments and overwrite {update} previously imported segments. Existing generated media is preserved by default.
preview.mediaPreserved: Existing generated media will be preserved by default.

errors.previewFailed: Preview failed. Please check the file and try again.
